model.embedding_head: Linear(576→512) → BN → ReLU → Dropout(0.2) → Linear(512→128) → BN

index.description: Exact nearest neighbor search with L2 distance

artifacts.model.pth: Trained model state dict (generated by scripts/train.py)
artifacts.id_mapping.npy: Index position to landmark ID mapping (generated by scripts/build_index.py)
artifacts.metadata.json: This file — project and artifact metadata

data.landmark_map.json: Landmark ID to human-readable name mapping
data.subset/train/: Training images organized by landmark ID
data.subset/test/: Test images organized by landmark ID
